how_it_works.title: Describe Your Barbershop
how_it_works.description: Name, services, atmosphere, and specialists — AI will understand the venue's style.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Website
how_it_works.description: Ready website with price list, online booking, and gallery will appear in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Add barber work photos, set prices, and launch the website.

faq.question: Can I add a service price list to the website?
faq.answer: Yes, a catalog of services with prices for haircuts, shaves, and grooming is easily added and updated.

faq.question: How will clients book online?
faq.answer: Built-in booking form allows selecting service, specialist, and convenient time — request comes to you.

faq.question: Is the design suitable for a barbershop?
faq.answer: Yes, there are rugged masculine templates with dark tones and stylish typography.

faq.question: Will the barbershop appear in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, websites are SEO-optimized — the barbershop will appear in city and neighborhood search results.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a barbershop website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and additional features.

faq.question: Can I add specialist work photos?
faq.answer: Yes, the gallery allows showing haircut examples and barber work from your venue.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate a stylish website with services and online booking — in 5 minutes.
cta_final_subtitle: Attract clients from the internet — create a website in 5 minutes.
